title: biscutella didyma var. coriophora
intro: Biscutella didyma var. coriophora, also known as the alpine biscutella, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Italian Alps. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, specifically as a diuretic and to treat kidney stones, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Biscutella didyma var. coriophora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made through infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
